get.summary: Gets all action opportunities with optional filtering and pagination.

parameters.name: searchTerm
parameters.description: Search term for title and description.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status filter: emerging, in-progress, completed.

parameters.name: parentIdeaId
parameters.description: Filter by parent idea ID.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort option: recent, updated, title, participants, progress.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based).

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page (default: 20, max: 100).

200.description: Paginated list of action opportunities with metadata.

post.summary: Creates a new action opportunity from an idea.

get.summary: Gets detailed information about a specific action opportunity.

parameters.name: actionOpportunityId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the action opportunity.

200.description: Detailed action opportunity information.
The ordered list of available action types.

get.summary: Gets all amendments for an idea with optional filtering and pagination.

parameters.name: ideaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the idea to retrieve amendments for.

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: Filter.IdeaId
parameters.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the idea associated with the amendments.

parameters.name: Filter.StatusFilter
parameters.description: Gets or sets the status filter for amendments.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: Paginated list of ideas with metadata.

post.summary: Proposes a new amendment to an existing idea.

parameters.name: ideaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the idea to amend.

201.description: Created response with the proposed amendment details.

get.summary: Gets detailed information about a specific amendment.

parameters.name: ideaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the idea that contains the amendment.

parameters.name: amendmentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the amendment to retrieve.

200.description: Detailed amendment information if found; otherwise, a 404 Not Found response.

get.summary: Gets supporters for a specific amendment with pagination support.

parameters.name: ideaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the idea that contains the amendment.

parameters.name: amendmentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the amendment to get supporters for.

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: Filter
parameters.description: Typed filter payload bound from the filter.* prefix (e.g., filter.status).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: A paginated response of supporters for the specified amendment.

get.summary: Gets opponents for a specific amendment with pagination support.

parameters.name: ideaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the idea that contains the amendment.

parameters.name: amendmentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the amendment to get opponents for.

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: Filter
parameters.description: Typed filter payload bound from the filter.* prefix (e.g., filter.status).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: A paginated response of opponents for the specified amendment.

get.summary: Gets support trend data for a specific amendment.

parameters.name: ideaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the idea that contains the amendment.

parameters.name: amendmentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the amendment to get trend data for.

200.description: Support trend data for the specified amendment.

parameters.name: ideaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the idea that contains the amendment.

parameters.name: amendmentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the amendment to support.

requestBody.description: The request containing the reason for supporting the amendment.

200.description: The updated support and opposition counts for the amendment.

parameters.name: ideaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the idea that contains the amendment.

parameters.name: amendmentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the amendment to oppose.

requestBody.description: The request containing the reason for opposing the amendment.

200.description: The updated support and opposition counts for the amendment.

parameters.name: ideaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the idea that contains the amendment.

parameters.name: amendmentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the amendment to withdraw support from.

200.description: The updated support and opposition counts for the amendment.

parameters.name: ideaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the idea that contains the amendment.

parameters.name: amendmentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the amendment to withdraw opposition from.

200.description: The updated support and opposition counts for the amendment.

get.summary: Issues a CSRF token cookie for anonymous visitors (double-submit cookie pattern).

200.description: 200 OK and sets the bc_csrf cookie.

get.summary: Get current authenticated user.

200.description: The current user if authenticated; otherwise unauthorized.

get.summary: Gets root posts for a specific thread with cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The ID of the thread.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination (null for first page).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of posts to return (default: 5).

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Direction of pagination (default: forward).

200.description: The root posts for the thread with cursor pagination.

post.summary: Creates a new root post in a specific thread.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The ID of the thread to post to.

201.description: The ID of the created post.

get.summary: Gets root posts for a thread identified by entity with cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: The type of entity (e.g., "idea", "signal", "action").

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: The ID of the entity.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination (null for first page).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of posts to return (default: 5).

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Direction of pagination (default: forward).

200.description: The root posts for the thread with cursor pagination.

get.summary: Gets replies to a specific post with cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The ID of the thread.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: The ID of the post to get replies for.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination (null for first page).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of replies to return (default: 5).

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: Direction of pagination (default: forward).

200.description: The replies for the post with cursor pagination.

post.summary: Creates a new reply to a specific post.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: The ID of the thread.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: The ID of the post to reply to.

201.description: The ID of the created reply.

post.summary: Uploads a document file and stores it in the system.

201.description: The unique identifier of the stored document.

get.summary: Gets a document in the specified size (thumbnail, display, or original).

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The document identifier.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The requested image size (thumbnail, display, original).

200.description: The document content with appropriate headers.

get.summary:
Gets document thumbnail specifically.
Convenience endpoint for easier frontend URL construction.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The document identifier.

200.description: The document thumbnail.

get.summary:
Gets document in display size specifically.
Convenience endpoint for easier frontend URL construction.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The document identifier.

200.description: The document in display size.

get.summary:
Gets all ideas with optional filtering and pagination.
When filterToMySocieties is true, results are scoped to the
authenticated participant's active society memberships. Anonymous users receive an empty list.

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: Filter.SocietyIds
parameters.description: Optional list of society IDs to scope the ideas to.

parameters.name: Filter.SearchTerm
parameters.description: Search term to filter ideas by title or description.

parameters.name: Filter.Tags
parameters.description: Filter by the tags associated with the idea.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

parameters.name: filterToMySocieties
parameters.description: When true, restricts results to the current user's societies.

200.description: Paginated list of ideas with metadata.

get.summary: Gets detailed information about a specific idea including amendments and lineage.

parameters.name: ideaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the idea.

200.description: Detailed idea information with amendments and lineage.

get.summary: Initiates the OIDC authorization request with PKCE and state.

200.description: Redirect to the identity provider's authorize endpoint.

get.summary: Signs the user out of both cookie and OIDC schemes, clears server-side tokens, and redirects to the app.

200.description: Redirect to post-logout location.

post.summary: Exchanges a refresh token for a new access token using the server-side token store.

200.description: 200 on success; 401 if session/refresh token missing; 502 on IdP error.

get.summary: Gets all signals with optional filtering and pagination.

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: Filter.TimeRange
parameters.description: Optional time window to filter signals, for example "24h" or "7d".

parameters.name: Filter.AmplificationLevel
parameters.description: Optional amplification level filter (e.g., "low", "medium", "high").

parameters.name: Filter.SearchTerm
parameters.description: Optional free-text search term to match against signal content.

parameters.name: Filter.Tags
parameters.description: Optional collection of tags to filter results by.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: A paginated list of filtered signals with metadata.

get.summary: Gets detailed information about a specific signal including amplification history.

parameters.name: signalId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the signal.

200.description: Detailed signal information with amplification history.

post.summary: Amplifies a signal by a participant.

parameters.name: signalId
parameters.description: The ID of the signal to amplify.

200.description: The amplification response with updated count.

delete.summary: Removes a user's amplification from a signal.

parameters.name: signalId
parameters.description: The ID of the signal to deamplify.

200.description: The deamplification response with updated count.

post.summary: Suggests an action on a signal.

parameters.name: signalId
parameters.description: The ID of the signal.

get.summary: Gets amplification trend data for a specific signal.

parameters.name: signalId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the signal.

200.description: Signal amplification trend data.

get.summary: Gets a paginated list of societies with optional filtering.

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: Filter.Tag
parameters.description: Gets or sets a tag to filter societies by; only societies with this tag are returned.

parameters.name: Filter.HasGeographicBounds
parameters.description:
Gets or sets a value indicating whether to filter to only societies that have geographic bounds.
When null, no geographic filtering is applied.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: Paginated list of societies.

get.summary: Gets detailed information about a specific society.

parameters.name: societyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the society.

200.description: Detailed society information.

get.summary: Gets the active members of a specific society.

parameters.name: societyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the society.

parameters.name: Page.Number
parameters.description: The current page number (1-based).

parameters.name: Page.Size
parameters.description: The requested page size.

parameters.name: Filter
parameters.description: Typed filter payload bound from the filter.* prefix (e.g., filter.status).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Parsed sort descriptors bound from the querystring parameter named 'sort'.

200.description: Paginated list of society members.

post.summary: Joins a society on behalf of the authenticated participant.

parameters.name: societyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the society to join.

requestBody.description: The join request containing the social contract ID.

get.summary:
Gets the IDs of all societies the authenticated participant is an active member of.
Returns an empty array for unauthenticated requests.

200.description: An array of society ID strings.

delete.summary: Removes the authenticated participant's membership from a society.

parameters.name: societyId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the society to leave.

get.summary: Gets popular tags based on usage frequency.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tags to return (default: 50, max: 100).

200.description: List of popular tags with usage counts.

get.summary: Searches for tags by query string.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tags to return (default: 20, max: 50).

200.description: List of matching tags.

get.summary: Gets recently used tags by the current user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of tags to return (default: 30, max: 100).

200.description: List of recently used tags.

ActionOpportunitiesFeedViewModel.description: View model for the action opportunities feed page, including action opportunities and metadata for filtering.

availableStatuses.description: All available statuses across all action opportunities (for filtering).

appliedFilters.description: The current filter state applied to this response.

PaginatedResponseOfActionOpportunityList.description: Generic paginated response wrapper for API endpoints.

items.description: The items for the current page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

totalCount.description: The total number of items across all pages.

ActionOpportunityListResponse.description: Response model for action opportunity list items.

id.description: The unique identifier of the action opportunity.

title.description: The title of the action opportunity.

description.description: A brief description of the action opportunity.

status.description: The status of the action opportunity.

parentIdeaId.description: The ID of the parent idea that spawned this action opportunity.

parentIdeaTitle.description: The title of the parent idea.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

updatedAt.description: The last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

participantCount.description: The number of participants committed to this action opportunity.

isCommitted.description: Whether the current user has committed to this action opportunity.

userCommitmentType.description: The current user's commitment type if committed.

ActionOpportunitiesFilterStateViewModel.description: Represents the filter state that was applied to generate this response.

searchTerm.description: The search term that was applied.

status.description: The status filter that was applied.

parentIdeaId.description: The parent idea ID filter that was applied.

sortBy.description: The sort option that was applied.

ApiEnvelopeOfActionOpportunityResponse.description: Generic API response envelope that wraps data with metadata.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the response was generated.

ActionOpportunityResponse.description: Response model for action opportunity details.

id.description: The unique identifier of the action opportunity.

title.description: The title of the action opportunity.

description.description: The description of the action opportunity.

status.description: The status of the action opportunity.

societyContext.description: The society context where this action opportunity is scoped.

parentIdeaId.description: The ID of the parent idea that spawned this action opportunity.

parentIdeaTitle.description: The title of the parent idea.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

updatedAt.description: The last update timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

participantCount.description: The number of participants committed to this action opportunity.

latestProgressUpdateAt.description: The timestamp of the latest progress update.

isCommitted.description: Whether the current user has committed to this action opportunity.

userCommitmentType.description: The current user's commitment type if committed.

CreateActionOpportunityRequest.description: Request model for creating a new action opportunity.

title.description: The title of the action opportunity.

description.description: The description of the action opportunity.

parentIdeaId.description: The ID of the parent idea that spawned this action opportunity.

ActionTypeResponse.description: Response model representing an available action type in the catalog.

id.description: The stable integer identifier used in events and API calls.

name.description:
The code name of the action type (e.g. MakeACall).
Use this value as ActionType when submitting a suggested action.
Display labels for this name are the responsibility of the presentation layer.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

PaginatedResponseOfAmendmentsListItemRes.description: Generic paginated response wrapper for API endpoints.

items.description: The items for the current page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

totalCount.description: The total number of items across all pages.

AmendmentsListItemResponse.description: Represents a response for an amendments list item.

ideaId.description: Gets the identifier of the idea this amendment belongs to.

authoredByCurrentUser.description: Gets a value indicating whether the content was authored by the current user.

status.description: Gets the status of the amendment.

opponentCount.description: Gets the number of opponents for this amendment.

opposedByCurrentUser.description: Gets a value indicating whether the current user has opposed the item.

supporterCount.description: Gets the number of supporters for this amendment.

supportedByCurrentUser.description: Gets the number of items or features supported by the current user.

createdAt.description: Gets when the amendment was created.

ApiResponse.description: Static factory methods for creating API responses.

SortDescriptor.description: Describes a single sort operation against a logical field.

field.description: Logical field name to sort by. Mapping to actual data model is responsibility of the consumer.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

AmendmentViewModel.description: View model for idea amendments, tailored for frontend display.

id.description: The unique identifier of the amendment.

shortDescription.description: A short description of the amendment for display in lists.

proposedTitle.description: The proposed title for the idea.

proposedBody.description: The proposed body/content for the idea.

proposedByCurrentUser.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the proposal was made by the current user.

status.description: The status of the amendment: open, approved, rejected, withdrawn, outdated.

targetVersionNumber.description: The version number of the target idea this amendment applies to.

propsedAt.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

acceptedOn.description: The acceptance timestamp in ISO 8601 format (if approved).

rejectedOn.description: The rejection timestamp in ISO 8601 format (if rejected).

supportedByCurrentUser.description: Whether the current user has supported this amendment.

opposedByCurrentUser.description: Whether the current user has opposed this amendment.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

PaginatedResponseOfAmendmentSupporterRes.description: Generic paginated response wrapper for API endpoints.

items.description: The items for the current page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

totalCount.description: The total number of items across all pages.

AmendmentSupporterResponse.description: Response model for an amendment supporter.

id.description: Gets the unique identifier of the supporter record.

pseudonym.description: Gets the pseudonym of the supporter.

reason.description: Gets the reason provided by the supporter for supporting the amendment.

supportedAt.description: Gets when the support was added.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

PaginatedResponseOfAmendmentOpponentResp.description: Generic paginated response wrapper for API endpoints.

items.description: The items for the current page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

totalCount.description: The total number of items across all pages.

AmendmentOpponentResponse.description: Response model for an amendment opponent.

id.description: Gets the unique identifier of the opponent record.

pseudonym.description: Gets the pseudonym of the opponent.

reason.description: Gets the reason provided by the opponent for opposing the amendment.

opposedAt.description: Gets when the opposition was added.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

AmendmentTrendResponse.description: Response model for amendment support trend data.

dataPoints.description: Gets the collection of trend data points showing supporter/opponent counts over time.

TrendPointResponse.description: Generic response model for a single data point in any trend.

date.description: Gets the date and time of this trend point in ISO 8601 format.

eventType.description:
Gets the type of event that occurred at this point in time.
The specific values depend on the context (e.g., "support", "oppose", "amplify", "attenuate").

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

amendmentId.description: The ID of the created amendment.

ProposeAmendmentRequest.description: Request model for proposing an amendment to an existing idea.

targetIdeaVersion.description: Gets or sets the version number of the target idea this amendment applies to.

proposedTitle.description: Gets or sets the proposed title for the amendment.

proposedBody.description: Gets or sets the proposed body/content for the amendment.

amendmentTitle.description: Gets or sets the title of the amendment.

amendmentDescription.description: Gets or sets the description of the amendment.

AmendmentVoteResponse.description: Response model for amendment voting operations (support, oppose, withdraw support, withdraw opposition).

supporterCount.description: The updated number of supporters for this amendment.

opponentCount.description: The updated number of opponents for this amendment.

SupportAmendmentRequest.description: Request model for supporting an amendment.

reason.description: The reason provided by the participant for supporting the amendment.

OpposeAmendmentRequest.description: Request model for opposing an amendment.

reason.description: The reason provided by the participant for opposing the amendment.

GetCurrentUserResponse.description: Response returned when querying the current authenticated user.

success.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the operation was successful.

error.description: Gets or sets an error message when Success is false; otherwise null.

user.description: Gets or sets the currently authenticated user information when available.

UserInfo.description: Basic user profile information used by the gateway.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the user.

username.description: Gets or sets the user's canonical username.

pseudonym.description: Gets or sets the user's pseudonym as displayed in context.

email.description: Gets or sets the user's email address.

PostsViewModel.description: Represents posts for a specific thread in the gateway with cursor-based pagination.

entityType.description: Gets or sets the type of entity this thread is about.

entityId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the entity this thread is about.

threadId.description: Gets or sets the thread ID for this discourse.

totalPostCount.description: Gets or sets the total number of all posts in this thread (includes replies).

totalRootPostCount.description: Gets or sets the total number of root posts in this thread.

totalParticipants.description: Gets or sets the total number of unique participants.

lastActivityAt.description: Gets or sets when the last post was created.

posts.description: Gets or sets the cursor-paginated root posts for this thread.

CursorPaginatedResponseOfPostViewModel.description:
Cursor-based paginated response wrapper for API endpoints.
Provides stable pagination using opaque cursors instead of offset-based pagination.

items.description: The items for the current page.

nextCursor.description:
Opaque cursor for retrieving the next page of results.
Null if no more pages are available.

previousCursor.description:
Opaque cursor for retrieving the previous page of results.
Null if this is the first page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

hasPreviousPage.description: Indicates whether there is a previous page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items requested for this page.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the response was generated.

PostViewModel.description: Represents an individual post in the gateway.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this post.

authorId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the participant who authored this post.

authorPseudonym.description: Gets or sets the pseudonym of the author.

content.description: Gets or sets the content of the post.

createdAt.description: Gets or sets when the post was created.

replyCount.description: Gets or sets the total number of direct replies.

lastReplyAt.description: Gets or sets when the last reply was posted.

hasReplies.description: Gets whether this post has replies.

PostRepliesViewModel.description: Represents replies to a post with cursor-based pagination.

postId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the parent post these replies belong to.

replies.description: Gets or sets the cursor-paginated replies to this post.

CursorPaginatedResponseOfReplyViewModel.description:
Cursor-based paginated response wrapper for API endpoints.
Provides stable pagination using opaque cursors instead of offset-based pagination.

items.description: The items for the current page.

nextCursor.description:
Opaque cursor for retrieving the next page of results.
Null if no more pages are available.

previousCursor.description:
Opaque cursor for retrieving the previous page of results.
Null if this is the first page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

hasPreviousPage.description: Indicates whether there is a previous page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items requested for this page.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the response was generated.

ReplyViewModel.description: Represents an individual reply in the gateway.

id.description: Gets or sets the unique identifier for this reply.

authorId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the participant who authored this reply.

authorPseudonym.description: Gets or sets the pseudonym of the author.

content.description: Gets or sets the content of the reply.

createdAt.description: Gets or sets when the reply was created.

parentPostId.description: Gets or sets the ID of the post this reply responds to.

replyCount.description: Gets or sets the total number of nested replies.

hasMoreReplies.description: Gets or sets whether there are nested replies.

CreatePostRequest.description: Request payload to create a new post.

content.description: Gets or sets the content of the post.

CreateReplyRequest.description: Request payload to create a new reply.

content.description: Gets or sets the content of the reply.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

sourceSignals.description: The source signals associated with this idea.

authorPseudonym.description: The pseudonym of the author who created the idea.

openAmendmentCount.description: The number of amendments made to this idea.

lastUpdatedAt.description: When the idea was last updated.

tags.description: The tags associated with this idea.

tags.description: The tags associated with the signal.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

amplificationCount.description: The number of amplifications for this signal.

commentCount.description: The number of comments for this signal.

isAmplifiedByCurrentUser.description: Indicates whether the current user has amplified this signal.

isOriginator.description: Indicates whether the current user is the originator of this signal.

firstAttachmentThumbnail.description:
URL to the first attachment thumbnail (if any images exist).
This provides a visual preview for the signal in the list view.

attachmentCount.description: Total number of attachments associated with this signal.

FilterStateViewModel.description: Represents the filter state that was applied to generate this response.

timeRange.description: The time range filter that was applied.

amplificationLevel.description: The amplification level filter that was applied.

searchTerm.description: The search term that was applied.

tags.description: The tags that were filtered by.

sortBy.description: The sort option that was applied.

CaptureSignalRequest.description: Request model for creating a signal.

tags.description: The tags for the signal, comma-separated.

attachments.description: The attachments associated with the signal.

latitude.description: Optional latitude coordinate of the signal's location.

longitude.description: Optional longitude coordinate of the signal's location.

Attachment.description: Represents an attachment associated with a document, including its identifier and an optional caption.

documentId.description: The unique identifier of the document associated with the attachment. This value cannot be null.

caption.description: An optional caption describing the attachment. This value can be null.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

SignalDetailViewModel.description: Detailed view model for a signal including amplification history and metadata.

id.description: The unique identifier of the signal.

tags.description: The tags associated with the signal.

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

lastAmplifiedAt.description: The last amplification timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

amplifyCount.description: The total number of amplifications for this signal.

amplifications.description: The list of amplifications for this signal.

isAmplifiedByCurrentUser.description: Indicates whether the current user has amplified this signal.

isOriginator.description: Indicates whether the current user is the originator of this signal.

attachments.description: The attachments associated with this signal.

suggestedActions.description: The suggested actions for this signal.

id.description: The unique identifier of the amplification.

amplifierPseudonym.description: The pseudonym of the person who amplified the signal.

amplifiedAt.description: The amplification timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

comment.description: Optional comment provided with the amplification.

AttachmentDetailViewModel.description: View model for signal attachment details including pre-built URLs for display.

documentId.description: The unique identifier of the document in the document service.

thumbnailUrl.description: The URL to the thumbnail version of the attachment.

displayUrl.description: The URL to the display-sized version of the attachment.

SuggestedActionViewModel.description: View model for a suggested action on a signal.

id.description: The unique identifier of the suggested action.

actionType.description: The action type code name (e.g. MakeACall, VisitAWebpage).

phoneNumber.description: The phone number to call. Present for MakeACall actions.

url.description: The URL to visit. Present for VisitAWebpage actions.

details.description: Optional free-text context provided by the suggester.

suggestedByPseudonym.description: The pseudonym of the participant who suggested the action.

suggestedAt.description: When the action was suggested, in ISO 8601 format.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

AmplifySignalResponse.description: Response model for amplifying a signal.

AmplifySignalRequest.description: Request model for amplifying a signal.

reason.description: The reason for amplifying the signal.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

DeamplifySignalResponse.description: Response model for deamplifying a signal.

SuggestActionRequest.description: Request model for suggesting a structured action on a signal.

actionType.description:
The action type name (e.g. MakeACall, VisitAWebpage).
Must match the Name of a value returned by GET /api/action-types.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number to call. Required when ActionType is MakeACall.

url.description: The URL to visit. Required when ActionType is VisitAWebpage.

details.description: Optional free-text context applicable to any action type.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

dataPoints.description: Gets the collection of trend data points showing amplification events over time.

allOf.description: Standardized API response envelope as defined in ADR-00016.

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

SocietiesFeedViewModel.description: View model for the societies list, including paginated society data.

PaginatedResponseOfSocietyListItemRespon.description: Generic paginated response wrapper for API endpoints.

items.description: The items for the current page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

totalCount.description: The total number of items across all pages.

id.description: The unique identifier of the society.

tags.description: The tags associated with the society.

hasGeographicBounds.description: Whether this society has geographic bounds.

SocietyDetailViewModel.description: View model for detailed society information.

SocietyResponse.description: Response model for a single society.

id.description: The unique identifier of the society.

tags.description: The tags associated with the society.

hasGeographicBounds.description: Whether this society has geographic bounds.

geographicBoundsJson.description: The geographic bounds as JSON, or null.

centerJson.description: The center coordinates as JSON, or null.

currentSocialContractId.description: The ID of the current active social contract, or null if not yet available.

relationshipType.description: The type of relationship as a string (e.g. "PartOf", "Affiliated", "Federated").

data.description: Gets or sets the response data.

PaginatedResponseOfSocietyMemberResponse.description: Generic paginated response wrapper for API endpoints.

items.description: The items for the current page.

hasNextPage.description: Indicates whether there is a next page of results.

pageSize.description: The number of items per page.

totalCount.description: The total number of items across all pages.

pseudonym.description: The pseudonym of the member, scoped to this society.

socialContractId.description: The social contract ID agreed to at join time.

EmptyFilter.description: An empty filter used for paginated queries that require no filtering criteria.

tags.description: The initial tags for the society.

ratificationThreshold.description: The decision protocol ratification threshold (e.g., 0.5 for 50%).

allowVeto.description: Whether a single principled objection can block a decision.

requiredVerificationWeight.description: The minimum verification weight required for signals.

center.description: Optional center coordinates for the society.

socialContractId.description: The ID of the social contract the participant is agreeing to.
